steps.t: Daervunn is at Esteldín in the North Downs, far to the south and west of Angmar. Laerdan instructed you to take Golodir's equipment to the Ranger Daer…
Toram is in Esteldín. Daervunn felt he could repair Golodir's shirt, but the sword and shield were beyond his ability. He asked you to speak to Toram …
Reclaim Golodir's sword and shield from Toram in Esteldín. Daervunn asked you to take Golodir's sword and shield to Toram, an armour-smith in Esteldín…
Daervunn is at Esteldín. You should return to Daervunn to collect Golodir's shirt and to see if he has any thoughts on how to repair Golodir's sword.
